verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I may not be the best at anything Or have the best of anything Sometimes I feel like I'm the least of all But I know someone who has everything And He's my everything And I'm happy just to know that I'm his child.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: His name is Jesus The righteous son of God He's the Lily of Valley The Bright and Morning Star His name is Jesus He's my everything And I'm happy just to know that I'm his child
